title: Crispy German Cornstarch Crumble
description: A festive, bitter, crispy German dish featuring cornstarch and other natural plant-based ingredients to create a delightful, gluten-free crumble suitable for all dietary needs.
instructions: In a mixing bowl, combine cornstarch, coconut oil, sugar if using, almond flour, chia seeds, and vanilla extract. Stir until the mixture becomes crumbly and cohesive.
Gradually add plant-based milk while stirring continuously until the mixture forms into a dough-like consistency.
Gently fold in fresh fruit of your choice to enhance flavors and colors.
Transfer dough onto a lined baking sheet or greased dish.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown on top. Check internal temperature of crumble at least reaching 165°F (74°C) using an instant-read thermometer.
Remove from oven and let cool slightly before serving.
